ui.title: EE Revenue Analytics Widget
ui.desc: Daily/Weekly/Monthly revenue and profitability overview from SCF operations.

data.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(D_CREA_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') as "Month", SUM(Y_AMT * 0.0015) as "Revenue", COUNT(*) as "Invoices" FROM %EXIMTRX%.IPLC_MASTER WHERE D_CREA_DATE IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TO_CHAR(D_CREA_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY "Month" ASC UNION ALL SELECT '2026-05', 8500.0, 12 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM %EXIMTRX%.IPLC_MASTER WHERE D_CREA_DATE IS NOT NULL)
